title: cynodon dactylon var. parviglumis
intro: Cynodon dactylon var. parviglumis, also known as buffalo grass or small spiky grass, is a variety of the common couch grass, characterized by its small spiky flowers and short stature. The plant has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cynodon dactylon var. parviglumis include its ability to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, as well as being used in poultices or topical applications to harness its medicinal properties.
